hero.subheadline: I don't just make things look pretty. I craft high-performance videos optimized for your specific goals—leveraging deep marketing insights to ensure every edit converts.

about.bio_paragraph1: I am Juan Gervasoni, a Senior Video Editor with over 12 years of experience transforming raw footage into high-impact visual stories. My background as a Marketing Specialist at Growth Marketers gives me a unique advantage: I don't just edit for aesthetics, I edit for performance.
about.bio_paragraph2: I bridge the gap between creative post-production and marketing ROI. Whether it's a viral TikTok or a high-stakes Meta campaign, every frame is a strategic decision designed to drive conversion and audience retention.

services.subheadline: A comprehensive suite of video editing and marketing services designed to scale your brand across every digital touchpoint.

items.title: Direct Response Ads
items.description: High-converting video ads optimized for Meta, TikTok, and YouTube. Fast-paced, hook-driven, and designed to lower CPA.

items.title: Organic Social Content
items.description: Engaging short-form content that builds community and brand awareness. Trend-adapted editing for maximum reach.

items.title: Brand Storytelling
items.description: Cinematic mini-documentaries and brand films that connect emotionally with your audience and build long-term trust.

items.title: Post-Production Mastery
items.description: Advanced color grading, sound design, and motion graphics that elevate your raw footage into a premium visual experience.

contact.subheadline: Ready to stop guessing and start converting? Select a time for our strategy session to discuss your video goals.
